Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.diff

Class Writer16MillionColors

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.diff.Writer16MillionColors
All Implemented Interfaces:
DiffWriter
public final class Writer16MillionColors extends Object
A terminal that supports 16 million colors.
See Also:

      Adds text that is equal in expected and actual.

    • writeDeleted

      public void writeDeleted(String text)
      Description copied from interface: DiffWriter
      Deletes text that is present in actual but not expected.

      Parameters:
      text - the text that needs to be deleted from actual

    • getDiffLines

      public List<String> getDiffLines()
      Specified by:
      getDiffLines in interface DiffWriter
      Returns:
      the lines to display after "actual" and before "expected" (empty lines should not be displayed)

      public String getPaddingMarker()

      Returns:
      a padding character used to align values vertically

      public List<Boolean> getEqualLines()
      Specified by:
      getEqualLines in interface DiffWriter
